heading: Assistance to foreign countries to meet minimum standards for the elimination of trafficking
label: 2152d Assistance to foreign countries to meet minimum standards for the elimination of trafficking

Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of functions of President under this section, see Ex. Ord. No. 12163, , 44 F.R. 56673, as amended, set out as a note under .Sept. 29, 1979section 2381 of this title

children.text: the drafting of laws to prohibit and punish acts of trafficking;
the investigation and prosecution of traffickers, including investigation of individuals and entities that may be involved in trafficking in persons involving sexual exploitation;
the creation and maintenance of facilities, programs, projects, and activities for the protection of victims; and
the expansion of exchange programs and international visitor programs for governmental and nongovernmental personnel to combat trafficking.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: b Funding
children.text: Amounts made available to carry out the other provisions of subchapter I of this chapter (including part IV of subchapter II of this chapter) and the Support for East European Democracy (SEED) Act of 1989 [ et seq.] shall be made available to carry out this section. Assistance may be provided under this section notwithstanding .22 U.S.C. 5401section 2420 of this title
